calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
William Weiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: SJC Group.
Plaintiff's witness: Charles Web, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Waterfront 2000, LLc.
Damages of $25,000.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment and calcultion the prejudgment interest and costs.

July 22, 2004
Proposed Judgment submitted for Prejudgment Interest in the amount of $2,479.45 and costs $250.00, for the total of $27,729.45.
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2004 Continued To Jul-22-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
William Weiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: SJC Group LLC.
Plaintiff's witness: Charles Web, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continued this matter to July 22, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Plaintiff to submit the copy of original signed LEASE agreement.
